title: The Art of Explanation
description: Why the best teachers are not experts, but translators.
content:
Explanation

There is a peculiar paradox in knowledge: the more you know about a subject, the harder it becomes to explain it to someone who doesn't.

The art of explanation is not about demonstrating how much you know. It is about meeting someone where they are.

Example

Consider Richard Feynman, the Nobel Prize-winning physicist known as "The Great Explainer."

"If you can't explain it simply, you don't understand it well enough."

Want to practice explaining?
